description_long: This is a fantasy-inspired short sword or large knife with a broad, single-edged blade that features a dramatic angular profile and a dark, almost blackened upper section. The blade is predominantly white with gold and red accents, and it has a thick, reinforced spine with visible bevels and stylized notches. The handle is wrapped in a red material, possibly leather, and is capped with gold-colored metal at both the pommel and the guard. The guard itself is ornate, flaring outward with gold and red embellishments, providing both protection and visual flair. The overall design suggests a ceremonial or decorative weapon, but the robust construction implies it could be functional as well. The object is visually striking, with a mix of metallic and painted finishes that give it a high-fantasy or video game aesthetic.
description: A broad, angular-bladed fantasy sword with a white and black blade, gold and red accents, and a red-wrapped handle with ornate gold fittings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blade, ornate gold and red guard, and the red-wrapped handle with gold pommel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, angular blade profile, white and black coloration, and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mostly white spine of the blade, the symmetrical guard, and the handle's end cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blade's angular geometry, black upper section, and the detailed handle wrap.
attribute_handle_design: curved, red-wrapped handle with gold pommel and decorative accents
attribute_ornamentation: gold and red decorative patterns on guard and pommel
